goal: Expand docs/community/COMMUNITY_MODULE_SPEC.md from a rewritten product spec into an implementation handoff document that other AI workers can execute against with clearer state flows, file responsibilities, operation contracts, delivery order, and explicit unresolved questions.
constraints: Keep the document aligned with the repository's current MainMenu/App modal-first integration pattern.
Do not implement runtime code in this task; this task is documentation and handoff refinement only.
Prefer concrete execution guidance over aspirational feature expansion.
If implementation-critical information is still unknown, mark it as UNKNOWN in the spec and record it in open_questions.md.
deliverables: An expanded COMMUNITY_MODULE_SPEC document with implementation-facing state model, ownership boundaries, component contracts, operation flows, and execution breakdown for other AI workers.
Updated open_questions.md for any durable UNKNOWN items surfaced during the handoff refinement.
